title: T4A slip:  Statement of Pension, Retirement, Annuity, and Other Income - Personal income tax - Canada.ca
content:
## T4A slip:  Statement of Pension, Retirement, Annuity, and Other Income – Personal income tax
For more information about the amounts shown on your T4A slip , see the corresponding box number below.
If you have any questions about the amounts shown on your T4A slip, contact the issuer of the slip.

## Box numbers for income sources
Recipient number Do not report this on your return.
Do not report this on your return.
Payer-offered dental benefits For calendar year 2023 and after, if an amount is reported in box 016, it is mandatory to indicate whether the recipient or any of their family members were eligible , on December 31 of that year, to access any dental care insurance, or coverage of dental services of any kind, that you offered. Otherwise, box 015 is optional. These codes are reported to support the administration of the Canadian Dental Care Plan . Do not report this code on your income tax return. For more information on the code entered on your T4A slip, go to T4A slip – Information for payers .
Payer-offered dental benefits
For calendar year 2023 and after, if an amount is reported in box 016, it is mandatory to indicate whether the recipient or any of their family members were eligible , on December 31 of that year, to access any dental care insurance, or coverage of dental services of any kind, that you offered. Otherwise, box 015 is optional. These codes are reported to support the administration of the Canadian Dental Care Plan .
Do not report this code on your income tax return.
For more information on the code entered on your T4A slip, go to T4A slip – Information for payers .
Pension or superannuation Enter this amount on line 11500 of your return. Eligible pension may qualify for the pension income amount. See line 31400 . See line 11500 if you received other pensions or superannuation and line 13000 if this amount is considered other income not reported anywhere else. Box 016 includes the amount from box 128, Veteran's benefits eligible for pension splitting. See Form T1032, Joint Election to Split Pension Income .
Pension or superannuation
Enter this amount on line 11500 of your return.
Eligible pension may qualify for the pension income amount. See line 31400 .
See line 11500 if you received other pensions or superannuation and line 13000 if this amount is considered other income not reported anywhere else.
Box 016 includes the amount from box 128, Veteran's benefits eligible for pension splitting.
See Form T1032, Joint Election to Split Pension Income .
Lump-sum payments Enter this amount on line 13000 of your return. Box 018 includes the following amounts: Box 102 – Lump-sum payments – non-resident services transferred under paragraph 60(j) Box 108 – Lump-sum payments from a registered pension plan (RPP) that you cannot transfer Box 110 – Lump-sum payments accrued to December 31, 1971 Box 158 – Lump-sum payments that you cannot transfer that are not reported elsewhere Box 180 – Lump-sum payments from a deferred profit-sharing plan (DPSP) that you cannot transfer Box 190 – Lump-sum payments from an unregistered plan
Enter this amount on line 13000 of your return.
Box 018 includes the following amounts:
- Box 102 – Lump-sum payments – non-resident services transferred under paragraph 60(j)
- Box 108 – Lump-sum payments from a registered pension plan (RPP) that you cannot transfer
- Box 110 – Lump-sum payments accrued to December 31, 1971
- Box 158 – Lump-sum payments that you cannot transfer that are not reported elsewhere
- Box 180 – Lump-sum payments from a deferred profit-sharing plan (DPSP) that you cannot transfer
- Box 190 – Lump-sum payments from an unregistered plan
Self-employed commissions Enter your gross commissions income on line 13899 and your net commissions income on line 13900 of your return.
Self-employed commissions
Enter your gross commissions income on line 13899 and your net commissions income on line 13900 of your return.
Income tax deducted Enter on line 43700 of your return the total income tax deducted from all your Canadian information slips issued in your name.
Enter on line 43700 of your return the total income tax deducted from all your Canadian information slips issued in your name.
Annuities See line 11500 to find out how to report this amount. Box 024 includes the following amounts: Box 111 – Income averaging annuity contracts (IAAC) Box 115 – Deferred profit-sharing plan (DPSP) annuity or instalment payments
See line 11500 to find out how to report this amount.
Box 024 includes the following amounts:
- Box 111 – Income averaging annuity contracts (IAAC)
- Box 115 – Deferred profit-sharing plan (DPSP) annuity or instalment payments
Other income Amounts not reported anywhere else on the T4A slip. See line 13000 and lines 13499 to 14300 . Enter the amount for employer-paid premiums or contributions to a non-group plan (such as: sickness, accident, disability or income maintenance insurance plan) to a retired employee on line 10400 .
Amounts not reported anywhere else on the T4A slip. See line 13000 and lines 13499 to 14300 .
Enter the amount for employer-paid premiums or contributions to a non-group plan (such as: sickness, accident, disability or income maintenance insurance plan) to a retired employee on line 10400 .
Patronage allocations Enter this amount on line 13000 of your return. Do not report this amount if it was for goods and services you consumed and cannot deduct the cost for when you calculate your income. This amount does not qualify for the federal dividend tax credit.
Patronage allocations
Enter this amount on line 13000 of your return.
Do not report this amount if it was for goods and services you consumed and cannot deduct the cost for when you calculate your income.
This amount does not qualify for the federal dividend tax credit.
Registered pension plan contributions (past service) Enter the amount you can deduct on line 20700 of your return. For more information, see Guide T4040, RRSPs and Other Registered Plans for Retirement . Box 032 includes the following amounts: Box 126 – Pre-1990 past service contributions while a contributor Box 162 – Pre-1990 past service contributions while not a contributor
Registered pension plan contributions (past service)
Enter the amount you can deduct on line 20700 of your return. For more information, see Guide T4040, RRSPs and Other Registered Plans for Retirement .
Box 032 includes the following amounts:
- Box 126 – Pre-1990 past service contributions while a contributor
- Box 162 – Pre-1990 past service contributions while not a contributor
Pension adjustment This amount is not an income or a deduction. Enter this amount on line 20600 of your return.
This amount is not an income or a deduction.
Enter this amount on line 20600 of your return.
Plan registration number Do not report this on your return.
Plan registration number
Do not report this on your return.
Advanced life deferred annuity purchase This is an amount you transferred to purchase an Advanced Life Deferred Annuity (ALDA). Do not report the amount on your return and do not claim a deduction for the amount transferred.
Advanced life deferred annuity purchase
This is an amount you transferred to purchase an Advanced Life Deferred Annuity (ALDA). Do not report the amount on your return and do not claim a deduction for the amount transferred.
RESP accumulated income payments Enter this amount on line 13000 of your return and complete Form T1172, Additional Tax on Accumulated Income Payments from RESPs. Box 040 includes the amount from box 122, RESP accumulated income payments paid to other.
RESP accumulated income payments
Enter this amount on line 13000 of your return and complete Form T1172, Additional Tax on Accumulated Income Payments from RESPs.
Box 040 includes the amount from box 122, RESP accumulated income payments paid to other.
RESP educational assistance payments Enter this amount on line 13000 of your return. For more information, see information sheet RC4092, Registered Education Savings Plans (RESP) .
RESP educational assistance payments
Enter this amount on line 13000 of your return.
For more information, see information sheet RC4092, Registered Education Savings Plans (RESP) .
Charitable donations Enter this amount on line 1 of your Schedule 9, Donations and Gifts . For more information, see line 34900 .
Charitable donations
Enter this amount on line 1 of your Schedule 9, Donations and Gifts .
For more information, see line 34900 .
Fees for services Enter the amount shown in box 048 on the applicable self-employment line of your return (lines 13499 to 14300) .
Enter the amount shown in box 048 on the applicable self-employment line of your return (lines 13499 to 14300) .
Lump-sum payments – non-resident services transferred under paragraph 60(j) This amount is already included in box 018 .
Lump-sum payments – non-resident services transferred under paragraph 60(j)
This amount is already included in box 018 .
Research grants The amount of research grants received minus any allowable expenses incurred for the purpose of carrying on the research work must be reported on line 10400 of your return.
The amount of research grants received minus any allowable expenses incurred for the purpose of carrying on the research work must be reported on line 10400 of your return.
Scholarships, fellowships, bursaries, and artists' project grants Enter this amount at line 13010 of your return.
Scholarships, fellowships, bursaries, and artists' project grants
Enter this amount at line 13010 of your return.
Death benefits This amount is a death benefit from sources other than the Canada Pension Plan or the Quebec Pension Plan. For more information, see line 13000 .
This amount is a death benefit from sources other than the Canada Pension Plan or the Quebec Pension Plan.
For more information, see line 13000 .
Payments from a wage-loss replacement plan Enter this amount on line 10400 of your return.
Payments from a wage-loss replacement plan
Enter this amount on line 10400 of your return.
Lump-sum payments from a registered pension plan (RPP) that you cannot transfer This amount is already included in box 018 .
Lump-sum payments from a registered pension plan (RPP) that you cannot transfer
This amount is already included in box 018 .
Periodic payments from an unregistered plan Enter this amount on line 13000 of your return.
Periodic payments from an unregistered plan
Enter this amount on line 13000 of your return.
Lump-sum payments accrued to December 31, 1971 This amount is already included in box 018 .
Lump-sum payments accrued to December 31, 1971
This amount is already included in box 018 .
Income averaging annuity contracts (IAAC) This amount is included in box 024 .
Income averaging annuity contracts (IAAC)
This amount is included in box 024 .
Deferred profit-sharing plan (DPSP) annuity or instalment payments This amount is already included in box 024 .
Deferred profit-sharing plan (DPSP) annuity or instalment payments
This amount is already included in box 024 .
Medical travel assistance Do not report this on your return.
Medical travel assistance
Do not report this on your return.
Loan benefits Enter this amount on line 13000 of your return.
Enter this amount on line 13000 of your return.
Medical premium benefits Enter this amount on line 10400 of your return.
Medical premium benefits
Enter this amount on line 10400 of your return.
Premiums paid to a group term life insurance plan Enter this amount on line 10400 of your return.
Premiums paid to a group term life insurance plan
Enter this amount on line 10400 of your return.
RESP accumulated income payments paid to other This amount is already included in box 40 .
RESP accumulated income payments paid to other
This amount is already included in box 40 .
Payments from a revoked DPSP Enter this amount on line 13000 of your return.
Payments from a revoked DPSP
Enter this amount on line 13000 of your return.
Board and lodging at special work sites Do not report this on your return.
Board and lodging at special work sites
Do not report this on your return.
Disability benefits paid out of a superannuation or pension plan Enter this amount on line 13000 of your return.
Disability benefits paid out of a superannuation or pension plan
Enter this amount on line 13000 of your return.
Pre-1990 past service contributions while a contributor This amount is already included in box 032 .
Pre-1990 past service contributions while a contributor
This amount is already included in box 032 .
Veterans' benefits Enter this amount on line 10400 of your return.
Enter this amount on line 10400 of your return.
Veterans' benefits eligible for pension splitting This amount is already included in box 016 . See Form T1032, Joint Election to Split Pension Income .
Veterans' benefits eligible for pension splitting
This amount is already included in box 016 .
See Form T1032, Joint Election to Split Pension Income .
Tax deferred cooperative share Enter this amount on line 13000 of your return. This amount may be deferred. For more information, see Line 9605 – Patronage dividends in Guide T4002, Self-employed Business, Professional, Commission, Farming, and Fishing Income .
Tax deferred cooperative share
Enter this amount on line 13000 of your return.
This amount may be deferred. For more information, see Line 9605 – Patronage dividends in Guide T4002, Self-employed Business, Professional, Commission, Farming, and Fishing Income .
Apprenticeship incentive grant or Apprenticeship completion grant Enter this amount on line 13000 of your return. For more information, see Apprenticeship Grants , or call 1-866-742-3644 .
Apprenticeship incentive grant or Apprenticeship completion grant
Enter this amount on line 13000 of your return.
For more information, see Apprenticeship Grants , or call 1-866-742-3644 .
Registered disability savings plan Enter this amount on line 12500 of your return.
Registered disability savings plan
Enter this amount on line 12500 of your return.
Wage Earner Protection Program Enter this amount on line 10400 of your return.
Wage Earner Protection Program
Enter this amount on line 10400 of your return.
Variable pension benefits Report variable pension benefits paid out of a money purchase RPP and variable payment life annuity amounts (VPLA) paid out of a PRPP using code 133. Do not report this amount using box 024. Learn more: Annuity payments .
Variable pension benefits
Report variable pension benefits paid out of a money purchase RPP and variable payment life annuity amounts (VPLA) paid out of a PRPP using code 133.
Do not report this amount using box 024.
Learn more: Annuity payments .
Tax‑free savings account (TFSA) taxable amount or taxable first home savings account (FHSA) – amount for a qualified donee Enter this amount on line 13000 of your return. If FHSA beneficiary distribution is received by a qualified donee, or if an amount is deemed received by a qualified donee on FHSA cessation, the amount is not reported at line 13000 on a T1 return.
Tax‑free savings account (TFSA) taxable amount or taxable first home savings account (FHSA) – amount for a qualified donee
Enter this amount on line 13000 of your return.
If FHSA beneficiary distribution is received by a qualified donee, or if an amount is deemed received by a qualified donee on FHSA cessation, the amount is not reported at line 13000 on a T1 return.
Recipient-paid premiums for private health services plans See line 33099 .
Recipient-paid premiums for private health services plans
Parents of Murdered or Missing Children/Parents of Young Victims of Crimes Enter this amount on line 13000 of your return.
Parents of Murdered or Missing Children/Parents of Young Victims of Crimes
Enter this amount on line 13000 of your return.
Indian Act (exempt income) – Other income Do not report this on your return.
Indian Act (exempt income) – Other income
Do not report this on your return.
Indian Act (exempt income) – Pension or superannuation Do not report this on your return.
Indian Act (exempt income) – Pension or superannuation
Do not report this on your return.
Indian Act (exempt income) – Lump-sum payments Do not report this on your return.
Indian Act (exempt income) – Lump-sum payments
Do not report this on your return.
Labour Adjustment Benefits Act and Appropriation Acts Enter this amount on line 13000 of your return.
Labour Adjustment Benefits Act and Appropriation Acts
Enter this amount on line 13000 of your return.
SUBP qualified under the Income Tax Act Enter this amount on line 10400 of your return.
SUBP qualified under the Income Tax Act
Enter this amount on line 10400 of your return.
Cash award or prize from payer Enter this amount on line 13000 of your return.
Cash award or prize from payer
Enter this amount on line 13000 of your return.
Bankruptcy settlement Enter this amount on line 10400 of your return.
Bankruptcy settlement
Enter this amount on line 10400 of your return.
Lump-sum payments that you cannot transfer that are not reported elsewhere This amount is included in box 018 .
Lump-sum payments that you cannot transfer that are not reported elsewhere
This amount is included in box 018 .
Pre-1990 past services contributions while not a contributor This amount is already included in box 032 .
Pre-1990 past services contributions while not a contributor
This amount is already included in box 032 .
Lump-sum payments from a deferred profit-sharing plan (DPSP) that you cannot transfer This amount is included in box 018 .
Lump-sum payments from a deferred profit-sharing plan (DPSP) that you cannot transfer
This amount is included in box 018 .
Lump-sum payments from an unregistered plan This amount is included in box 018 .
Lump-sum payments from an unregistered plan
This amount is included in box 018 .
PRPP payments See line 11500 and line 13000 for information on pooled registered pension plans (PRPP).
See line 11500 and line 13000 for information on pooled registered pension plans (PRPP).
Indian Act (exempt income) – PRPP payments Do not report this on your return.
Indian Act (exempt income) – PRPP payments
Do not report this on your return.
Tuition assistance for adult basic education Enter at line 25600 the amount of tuition assistance that is more than the scholarship exemption you can claim for this tuition assistance.
Tuition assistance for adult basic education
Enter at line 25600 the amount of tuition assistance that is more than the scholarship exemption you can claim for this tuition assistance.
Canada Emergency Response Benefit (CERB) Enter this amount on line 13000 of your return.
Canada Emergency Response Benefit (CERB)
Enter this amount on line 13000 of your return.
Canada Emergency Student Benefit (CESB) Enter this amount on line 13000 of your return.
Canada Emergency Student Benefit (CESB)
Enter this amount on line 13000 of your return.
Canada Emergency Student Benefit (CESB) for eligible students with disabilities or those with children or other dependents Enter this amount on line 13000 of your return.
Canada Emergency Student Benefit (CESB) for eligible students with disabilities or those with children or other dependents
Enter this amount on line 13000 of your return.
Provincial/Territorial COVID-19 financial assistance payments Enter this amount on line 13000 of your return.
Provincial/Territorial COVID-19 financial assistance payments
Enter this amount on line 13000 of your return.
Repayment of COVID-19 financial assistance For federal COVID-19 benefits received in 2020 or 2021 and repaid in 2022, see line 23210 . For federal COVID-19 benefits received and repaid in 2022, see line 13000 . For federal COVID-19 benefits repaid in 2023 or later, see line 23200 . For provincial and territorial COVID-19 benefits received and repaid at any time, see line 23200 .
Repayment of COVID-19 financial assistance
For federal COVID-19 benefits received in 2020 or 2021 and repaid in 2022, see line 23210 .
For federal COVID-19 benefits received and repaid in 2022, see line 13000 .
For federal COVID-19 benefits repaid in 2023 or later, see line 23200 .
For provincial and territorial COVID-19 benefits received and repaid at any time, see line 23200 .
Canada Recovery Benefit (CRB) Enter this amount on line 13000 of your return. Go to line 23500 to see if you need to repay.
Canada Recovery Benefit (CRB)
Enter this amount on line 13000 of your return. Go to line 23500 to see if you need to repay.
Canada Recovery Sickness Benefit (CRSB) Enter this amount on line 13000 of your return.
Canada Recovery Sickness Benefit (CRSB)
Enter this amount on line 13000 of your return.
Canada Recovery Caregiving Benefit (CRCB) Enter this amount on line 13000 of your return.

Enter this amount on line 13000 of your return.
One-time payment for older seniors Enter this amount on line 13000 of your return.

Enter this amount on line 13000 of your return.
Postdoctoral fellowship income This amount is already included in box 105 .
Postdoctoral fellowship income
This amount is already included in box 105 .
Canada Worker Lockdown Benefit (CWLB) Enter this amount on line 13000 of your return.
Canada Worker Lockdown Benefit (CWLB)
Enter this amount on line 13000 of your return.
